header.subtitle: a Python library for extracting key information from receipts and preparing essential German tax return statements

recent_filter.empty: No receipts uploaded within this window.

delete_confirm.title: Delete from database?
delete_confirm.hint: This cannot be undone. The PDF archive is kept.

sidebar.taxpayer_hint: Provide your data so the AI won’t confuse you with the counterparty.

preview.empty:
Select a receipt from the sidebar
to preview it here.
preview.rate_no_data: No rate data returned for this currency
preview.no_rate_warning: No {{currency}} → EUR rate. Tax reports (EÜR/UStVA) will treat {{currency}} amounts as EUR — results will be incorrect. Enter the rate above.
preview.no_rate_banner: No exchange rate. EÜR/UStVA reports will treat {{currency}} amounts as EUR — results will be incorrect. Scroll to the amounts section and enter the rate manually.
preview.verified_db_hint: Counterparty is marked verified — click ✓ to confirm for this receipt
preview.private_use_tooltip: Share used privately (0–100 %). Only the business portion (1 – share) is tax-deductible and counted in the VAT return.

dashboard.title: Overview
dashboard.no_data_hint: No data yet — upload receipts to see breakdown.
dashboard.vat_doc_count: Based on {{count}} document in current view
dashboard.vat_doc_count_plural: Based on {{count}} documents in current view
dashboard.elster_tip_taxable_supplies: Chapter 3 – Supplies and other services (including non-cash benefits)
dashboard.elster_tip_taxable_supplies_uste: Chapter 3 – B. Taxable supplies, other services and non-cash benefits
dashboard.elster_tip_line66_2: Row 38: Input VAT from invoices of other entrepreneurs (§ 15 para. 1 sent. 1 no. 1 UStG), from supplies under § 13a para. 1 no. 6 UStG (§ 15 para. 1 sent. 1 no. 5 UStG) and from intra-Community triangular transactions (§ 25b para. 5 UStG).
dashboard.vat_input_regular_label: Input VAT from supplier invoices (§ 15 Abs. 1 Nr. 1 UStG)
dashboard.vat_einfuhr_label: Einfuhrumsatzsteuer / Import VAT (§ 15 Abs. 1 Nr. 2 UStG)
dashboard.uste_input_regular_label: Input VAT from invoices of other entrepreneurs (§ 15 para. 1 sent. 1 no. 1 UStG)
dashboard.elster_tip_line83: Chapter 9 – VAT advance payment / surplus and calculation
dashboard.tile_eur_sub: Annual simplified profit & loss · § 4 para. 3 EStG
dashboard.gewst_verlegt: Sole establishment relocated during the year
dashboard.gewst_no_liability: Trade income ≤ 0 — no trade tax liability for this period.
dashboard.gewst_disclaimer: Trade Tax Return (§ 14 GewStG): No Freibetrag applies to GmbH / Kapitalgesellschaft. Gewerbeertrag is approximated from the net income in this project. Adjustments (e.g. Hinzurechnungen § 8, Kürzungen § 9) must be made manually. File via ELSTER.
dashboard.kst_anlage_gk_title: Anlage GK — Income from Business (Einkünfte aus Gewerbebetrieb)
dashboard.kst_steuerbilanzgewinn: Tax balance profit / loss (Steuerbilanzgewinn, § 60 Abs. 2 EStDV)
dashboard.kst_steuerbilanz_note_2: Net profit/loss per tax balance sheet (§ 5b EStG / § 60 Abs. 2 EStDV)
dashboard.kst_steuerbilanz_note_3: If using EÜR (§ 4 Abs. 3 EStG): Zeile 12 — Anlage EÜR Zeile 89 minus Zeile 90
dashboard.kst_steuerbilanz_note_4: Estimated from receipts — prepare tax balance sheet manually
dashboard.kst_steuerbilanz_note_5: ELSTER: whole euros only (rounded) — prefix negative amounts with a minus sign
dashboard.kst_zve_gesamtbetrag_title: Calculation of aggregate income (Gesamtbetrag der Einkünfte)
dashboard.kst_zve_row1: Z. 1 · Income from agriculture and forestry (L+F)
dashboard.kst_zve_row2: Z. 2 · Income from business (Einkünfte aus Gewerbebetrieb)
dashboard.kst_zve_row2_note: Anlage ZVE · Z. 2 ← transfer from Anlage GK (result)
dashboard.kst_zve_row2_note_2: For a GmbH with only business income, this is the only line to fill in
dashboard.kst_zve_row3_7: Z. 3–7 · Other income types (self-employed, capital, rental, other)
dashboard.kst_zve_row8_14: Z. 8–14 · Special cases (§ 32 KStG, DTA, AStG, InvStG, restructuring ...)
dashboard.kst_zve_row16_26: Z. 16–26 · Corrections (L+F exemption, donations, § 8c KStG, Organträger, UmwStG ...)
dashboard.kst_zve_row28_note: Anlage ZVE · Z. 28 — prior-year loss carry-forward (closing balance from prior year's Anlage Verluste)
dashboard.kst_zve_row28_note_2: Amount from the Verlustfeststellungsbescheid — enter manually in ELSTER
dashboard.kst_zve_row29_31: Z. 29–31 · Deduction § 10g, pension funds, public broadcasters
dashboard.kst_zve_row33: Z. 33 · Taxable income (zu versteuerndes Einkommen, ZVE)
dashboard.kst_zve_row34_36: Z. 34–36 · Further details (different tax rates, trade associations, InvStG)
dashboard.kst_no_liability: Taxable income ≤ 0 — no corporate tax liability for this period.
dashboard.kst_anlage_verluste_subtitle: § 10d EStG in conjunction with § 31 Abs. 1 KStG · Not applicable under § 8 Abs. 9 KStG
dashboard.kst_vlv_anfangsbestand_note_2: Closing balance from the prior year's tax assessment or loss determination — enter manually in ELSTER
dashboard.kst_vlv_verlust_jahr_note: Anlage Verluste · Section 2 — enter as a positive number (no minus sign)
dashboard.kst_vlv_z20_ruecktrag: Section 2 · Z. 20 · Possible loss carryback to the preceding assessment period
dashboard.kst_vlv_z20_note: Mandatory field whenever Z. 2 is filled — must be entered explicitly, even if 0
dashboard.kst_vlv_z20_note_2: No carryback desired: enter 0. Error otherwise: „a qualifying loss was stated but no possible carryback in Z. 20 ...“
dashboard.kst_vlv_beitrittsgebiet: Section 6 · Loss from accession territory (§ 57 Abs. 4 EStG)
dashboard.kst_vlv_endbestand_note: The closing balance is the new loss carry-forward — enter it as the opening balance in Anlage Verluste (Section 1) next year.
dashboard.kst_kst1_z9_note: Enter the legal form in the taxpayer profile (left sidebar) – it will be picked up automatically.
dashboard.kst_kst1_z14_note: Normal calendar year: 01.01.– 31.12. of the assessment period. Enter actual dates if the financial year differs.
dashboard.kst_kst1_z14a: Z. 14a · Corporation was newly incorporated in the assessment period
dashboard.kst_kst1_z14a_note: Tick because the founding year matches the assessment period
dashboard.kst_kst1_anteilseigner_title: Section 8 · Name and address of shareholders
dashboard.kst_kst1_anteilseigner_note: Enter all shareholders in ELSTER via „Weitere Daten hinzufügen“: name, address, shareholding %, voting rights
dashboard.kst_kst1_anteilseigner_note_2: Holdings below 1 % may be aggregated. Z. 26/27 (changed voting rights / changes vs. prior year) — leave blank for first year
dashboard.kst_kst1_z_organschaft: Declaration for separate determination of income of the controlled entity (§ 14 Abs. 5 KStG — Organschaft)
dashboard.kst_kst1_z_organschaft_note: Tick only if the GmbH is a controlled entity (Organgesellschaft) — leave unchecked for a standalone GmbH without a controlling parent
dashboard.kst_kst1_z_einlagekonto: Declaration for separate determination of the tax contribution account (§ 27 Abs. 2 KStG) and nominal capital arising from conversion of reserves (§ 28 Abs. 1 Satz 3 KStG)
dashboard.kst_kst1_z_einlagekonto_note: Tick this because Anlage KSt 1 F is being submitted — this checkbox links the Hauptvordruck to that Anlage
dashboard.kst_kst1_z_einlagekonto_note_2: Error without this tick: „KSt 1 F was submitted but the Hauptvordruck does not indicate that the declaration also covers the separate determination of the Einlagekonto“
dashboard.kst_kst1_z10: Z. 10 · Tax exemption under § 5 Abs. 1 KStG
dashboard.kst_kst1_z10_note: Do NOT click this field — leave it completely blank, including „Keine Angabe“. ELSTER rejects any selection when the GmbH is fully taxable
dashboard.kst_kst1_z10_note_2: Leave the entire field untouched. The error occurs precisely when anything is selected — same behaviour as Z. 17a
dashboard.kst_kst1_z17_note: Mandatory field — must be actively clicked to No. Blank field causes: „Missing statement whether § 8 Abs. 9 KStG applies“
dashboard.kst_kst1_z17_note_2: Only relevant for public-law bodies (e.g. municipal utilities) and their controlled entities — for a private GmbH: No
dashboard.kst_kst1_z16: Z. 16 · Shares subject to § 8b Abs. 7 KStG
dashboard.kst_kst1_z16_note: Only applies to financial institutions holding shares as current assets — for a regular GmbH: No / leave blank
dashboard.kst_kst1_z17: Z. 17 · § 8 Abs. 9 KStG (Spartenrechnung) or Organgesellschaft with public-sector Organträger
dashboard.kst_kst1_z17a: Z. 17a · Type of investment fund (§ 1 InvStG)
dashboard.kst_kst1_z17a_note: Leave the field empty — do not select any value. The „Invalid input“ error occurs when ELSTER pre-fills a default.
dashboard.kst_kst1_z17a_note_2: Fix: click the field and press Delete / Backspace until it is completely empty
dashboard.kst_1f_title: Anlage KSt 1 F — Tax Contribution Account
dashboard.kst_1f_required_note: Mandatory for GmbH / AG (§ 1 Abs. 1 No. 1–2 KStG) under § 27 KStG — even when all values are zero.
dashboard.kst_1f_stammkapital_note: Registered share capital from the articles of association and commercial register — not the same as Eigenkapital (equity)
dashboard.kst_1f_s3_ek_note_2: Eigenkapital = Stammkapital + capital reserves + retained earnings + annual surplus/deficit
dashboard.kst_1f_s3_ek_note_3: Estimate from receipts: Stammkapital + cumulative tax profits/losses from founding year through VZ year-end (calculated automatically)
dashboard.kst_1f_s3_einlagekonto: Z. 19 · Positive balance of the tax contribution account deducted
dashboard.kst_1f_s3_ek19_note: Tax contribution account (§ 27 KStG): Only contributions ABOVE registered capital (e.g. share premium, additional deposits). Normal share capital payments are not recorded here.
dashboard.kst_1f_s3_ek19_note_2: For a standard GmbH with no extra equity injections = 0. In ELSTER: enter 0 or leave blank.
dashboard.kst_1f_s3_approx_note: Estimate from receipts: Stammkapital + Σ tax profits/losses from founding year — covers booked receipts only, no manual balance sheet entries
dashboard.kst_1f_s1_row: Company name, financial year, shareholder list
dashboard.kst_1f_s1_note: Name and address of the corporation, start and end of financial year — pre-filled in ELSTER from the Hauptvordruck
dashboard.kst_1f_s2_title: Section 2 · Profit distributions / payments made during the financial year
dashboard.kst_1f_s2_note: Amount of the distribution resolution — if no distribution: leave blank / 0
dashboard.kst_1f_s2_note_2: Distributions from the tax contribution account must be shown separately here
dashboard.kst_1f_s3_title: Section 3 · Calculation of distributable profit (§ 27 Abs. 1 S. 5 KStG)
dashboard.kst_1f_s3_eigenkapital: Equity per tax balance sheet (end of assessment period)
dashboard.kst_1f_s3_note: Equity from the tax balance sheet — for first year or EÜR it can only be approximated; enter manually
dashboard.kst_1f_s4_title: Section 4 · Excess / shortfall transfers under § 27 Abs. 6 KStG
dashboard.kst_1f_s4_note: Only relevant under a tax consolidation (Organschaft) — leave blank for a standalone GmbH
dashboard.kst_1f_s5_title: Section 5 · Contribution account (§ 27 Abs. 2) and nominal capital from conversion (§ 28 Abs. 1 S. 3)
dashboard.kst_1f_eintrittsdatum: Date of entry into unrestricted tax liability
dashboard.kst_1f_eintrittsdatum_note: Section 5 · Mandatory in the founding year: date of commercial register entry (or 01.01. of the first financial year)
dashboard.kst_1f_eintrittsdatum_note_2: Error without this date: „The date of entry into unrestricted tax liability must be stated together with the balance at that date ...“
dashboard.kst_1f_anfangsbestand: Opening balance of the tax contribution account
dashboard.kst_1f_anfangsbestand_note: First financial year: 0; otherwise the closing balance from the prior-year Feststellungsbescheid
dashboard.kst_1f_anfangsbestand_note_2: The Einlagekonto represents shareholder contributions not derived from taxed profits (e.g. registered capital on formation)
dashboard.kst_1f_anfangsbestand_note_3: Mandatory field — must be entered explicitly, even if 0. Error otherwise: „KSt 1 F requires at least one opening balance ...“
dashboard.kst_1f_z40: Z. 40 · Einlagekonto at entry into unrestricted tax liability (§ 27 Abs. 2 Satz 3 KStG)
dashboard.kst_1f_z40_note: Founding year only: opening balance of the tax contribution account (§ 27 KStG) at the time of entry. For a standard GmbH with no share premium/additional deposits = 0.
dashboard.kst_1f_z40_note_2: Normal share capital payments are NOT recorded as Einlagekonto contributions — they are already Nennkapital. Enter 0 explicitly.
dashboard.kst_1f_z41: Z. 41 · Sonderausweis at entry (§ 28 Abs. 1 Satz 3 KStG)
dashboard.kst_1f_z41_note: Leave blank — do not enter 0 either. ELSTER only accepts an entry here if a Sonderausweis (§ 28 Abs. 1) actually existed. For a normal founding GmbH: completely blank.
dashboard.kst_1f_z42: Z. 42 · Einlagekonto: balance at end of prior financial year (§ 27 Abs. 2 Satz 1 KStG)
dashboard.kst_1f_z42_note: Leave blank in the founding year — this field is only for subsequent years (closing balance from prior-year Feststellungsbescheid).
dashboard.kst_1f_z42_note_2: Root cause of errors: values in both Z. 40 AND Z. 42 simultaneously. ELSTER only allows one of the two rows.
dashboard.kst_1f_z43: Z. 43 · Sonderausweis: balance at end of prior financial year (§ 28 Abs. 1 Satz 3 KStG)
dashboard.kst_1f_z43_note: Leave blank in the founding year — subsequent years only. Do not enter 0 either.
dashboard.kst_1f_zugaenge: + Additions (contributions, capital increases in the assessment period)
dashboard.kst_1f_zugaenge_note: Cash or in-kind contributions by shareholders during the year — check manually
dashboard.kst_1f_abgaenge: − Deductions (used for distributions from the contribution account)
dashboard.kst_1f_endbestand: = Closing balance of the tax contribution account
dashboard.kst_1f_sonderausweis: Sonderausweis (§ 28 Abs. 1 S. 3 KStG) — nominal capital from converted reserves
dashboard.kst_1f_sonderausweis_note: Only relevant if retained earnings were capitalised into nominal capital — otherwise 0
dashboard.kst_1f_s6_title: Section 6 · Proceeds under § 7 UmwStG on demerger (Abspaltung)
dashboard.kst_1f_s6_note: Only required if a subsidiary was demerged — leave blank for a normal GmbH without restructuring
dashboard.kst_1f_s7_title: Section 7 · Proceeds under § 7 UmwStG on merger, spin-off or conversion to partnership
dashboard.kst_1f_s7_note: Only required in a UmwStG restructuring — leave blank for a normal GmbH without restructuring
dashboard.kst_1f_open_note: Open Anlage KSt 1 F in ELSTER. First year: complete Section 1, set all amounts to 0. From year two: carry the opening balance forward from the prior-year assessment.
dashboard.kst_wa_required_note: Mandatory attachment whenever a legal form (GmbH, AG …) is entered in KSt 1 Hauptvordruck — even if all fields are left blank.
dashboard.kst_wa_row1: Section 1 · Credit for withholding taxes § 36 Abs. 2 Nr. 2 in conj. with § 36a EStG
dashboard.kst_wa_row1_note: Z. 6 (Kapitalertragsteuer) and Z. 7 (SolZ thereon) must always be entered together or both left blank
dashboard.kst_wa_row1_note_2: Error otherwise: „Entries for creditable withholding tax in Z. 6 exist but no corresponding SolZ (Z. 7), or vice versa“ — fill both with 0 if no Kapitalertragsteuer arose
dashboard.kst_wa_row3: Section 3 · Credit for foreign tax § 50d Abs. 10 S. 5 EStG in conj. with § 26 Abs. 1 KStG
dashboard.kst_wa_row4: Section 4 · Harmful acquisition of shareholding § 8c KStG
dashboard.kst_wa_row4_note: Required if more than 25 % of shares were transferred to one acquirer during the financial year
dashboard.kst_wa_row4_note_2: For initial founding or unchanged ownership structure: leave blank
dashboard.kst_wa_row5: Section 5 · Continuity-bound loss / interest carry-forward § 8d KStG
dashboard.kst_wa_row6_note: Disclose: loan, rental, lease or service agreements with shareholders or related persons
dashboard.kst_wa_row6_note_2: Typical: managing director employment contract, shareholder loan, office / vehicle rental from GGF
dashboard.kst_wa_row7: Section 7 · Supervisory board remuneration to unrestricted taxpayers
dashboard.kst_wa_row8: Section 8 · Country-by-country report of multinational enterprise groups § 138a AO
dashboard.kst_wa_row9: Section 9 · Remuneration § 50a Abs. 1 No. 1–4 and Abs. 7 EStG (e.g. licence fees)
dashboard.kst_wa_row10: Section 10 · Corona emergency/bridging grants and comparable subsidies
dashboard.kst_wa_open_note: Open Anlage WA in ELSTER and save without any input — that alone clears the mandatory error. Sections 1–3, 5, 7–9 are typically blank for a simple GmbH. Check Section 6 if contracts with shareholders exist.
dashboard.kst_disclaimer: Corporate Tax Return (§ 31 KStG, Form KSt 1): Flat rate 15 % (§ 23 KStG) applies to GmbH / AG. Taxable income is approximated from net receipts in this project. Non-deductible expenses (§ 10 KStG), loss carry-forwards (§ 10d EStG), and other adjustments must be applied manually. Solidarity surcharge at 5.5 % of KSt. File via ELSTER.
dashboard.elster_tip_uste_line119: Chapter 12 – K. Calculation of VAT payable (Zeile 119)
dashboard.uste_final_balance_label: Amount still due to tax office – final payment / refund claim
dashboard.uste_disclaimer: Annual VAT Return (§ 18 Abs. 3 UStG): Filing via ELSTER is mandatory. Figures are calculated from documents stored in this project. Verify completeness and correctness before submission. Advance payments (Vorauszahlungen) are offset by the tax authority.
dashboard.jab_subtitle: Balance Sheet + P&L · §§ 242–256a HGB · Simplified for Kleinstkapitalgesellschaft (§ 267a HGB)
dashboard.jab_year_hint_all: set the sidebar to a specific year for year-based reports
dashboard.jab_gruendung_note: Registered capital {{stammkapital}}, paid in at registration {{eingezahlt}}, outstanding {{ausstehend}} (§ 272 Abs. 1 HGB). The unpaid portion has not yet been called up.
dashboard.jab_nettomethode_note: Net method (§ 272 I S. 2 HGB): non-called-up contributions are deducted from equity on the liabilities side. Balance-sheet total reflects only the paid-in capital.
dashboard.jab_disclaimer: Kleinstkapitalgesellschaft (§ 267a HGB): There is no statutory obligation to involve a Steuerberater. The Geschäftsführer may prepare and submit the annual accounts, E-Bilanz (ELSTER) and Bundesanzeiger filing directly, provided the factual requirements are met. An ELSTER organisation certificate for the GmbH is required.

db.title: Select Project
db.name_hint: Lowercase letters, digits, hyphens and underscores.
